DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING ON THIS DEMURRER. MATTER REFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 206 FOR ASSIGNMENT BY THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL TO ANOTHER JUDGE ON THE BASIS THAT PLAINTIFF JACQUES KHOROZIAN IS AN EMPLOYEE OF THE SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT. ADDITIONALLY, DEFENDANT FOSTER DIXIANA CORPORATION'S MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS & TO DISMISS FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION WHICH WAS ARGUED ON OCTOBER 6, 2004 AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY THE HON. JAMES L. WARREN IS ORDERED REFERRED FOR ASSIGNMENT BY THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL AS WELL. THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING ON THIS MOTION TO QUASH IS ORDERED VACATED. HON. JAMES L. WARREN; COURT REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT GILDA SERRANO'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS WAS ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 10/06/04. IT HAS COME TO THE ATTENTION OF THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF, JACQUES KHOROZIAN, IS A COURT EMPLOYEE; THIS COURT MUST RECUSE ITSELF. ACCORDINGLY, THIS MOTION IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THE ENTIRE MATTER WILL NEED TO BE HEARD BY A DIFFERENT JUDGE. HON. JAMES L. WARREN; COURT REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR 1558

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A In Support
Off Calendar Oct-29-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jeffrey margulies, Esq. of BRAVO & MARGULIES 512-6700 for Plaintiffs JACQUES KHOROZIAN and RAFFY KHOROZIAN opposing party
* No appearance by defendant JOHN SERRANO demurring party. The Court vacates its tentative ruling. This demurrer is referred to Department 206 for assignment to by the Judicial Council on the basis that Plaintiff JACQUES KHOROZIAN is an employee of the San Francisco Superior Court. Additionally, DEFENDANT FOSTER DIXIANA CORPORATION'S MOTION To Quash Summons & To Dismiss For Lack Of Jurisdiction which was argued on October 6, 2004 and taken under submission by the Hon. JAMES L. WARREN is ordered referred for assignment by the Judicial Council as well. the Court's tentative ruling on this motion to quash is ordered vacated. Hon. JAMES L. WARREN; Court Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558 (eh)
